basics.name: Jakob Hohlfeld
basics.label: Senior Fullstack Developer & Web Technology Expert
basics.summary: An experienced software developer focused on modern web technologies, cloud infrastructure, and data-driven platforms. I combine technical excellence with methodical clarity to transform complex requirements into functional digital products.

projects.name: Pipmyday (Startup)
projects.description: Development of a real-time data analytics platform for Forex trading with a focus on usability and performance.
highlights: Concept and development of a real-time dashboard
Implementation of big data analytics and streaming technology
Use of Python, C++, MeteorJS, Docker, MongoDB, Redis

projects.name: Zalando
projects.description: Integration of advertising on the Zalando storefront and development of a self-service portal with DFP (DoubleClick for Publishers) and AWS.
highlights: Requirements analysis and prototype development
Integration of DoubleClick for Publishers
Development of a partner portal with AngularJS
Use of AWS cloud services

projects.name: TomTom
projects.description: Frontend development and relaunch of the TomTom Webfleet fleet management system with ReactJS.
highlights: Development of responsive UIs
Use of ReactJS, Webpack and JavaScript
Knowledge sharing via pair programming
Close collaboration with architects

projects.name: Volkswagen
projects.description: Modernization of the car configurator with a focus on usability and compatibility.
highlights: Frontend development with ReactJS
Integration of new features
Cross-browser compatibility

projects.name: Lokalportal
projects.description: Migration of the web frontend from AngularJS to ReactJS to modernize the platform.
highlights: Migration from AngularJS to ReactJS
Implementation of new features
Improvement of the technological foundation

projects.name: Lufthansa
projects.description: Redesign of the booking pages with ReactJS and improved middleware integration.
highlights: Frontend development of the booking pages
Planned and implemented Scrum work packages
Coaching within the development team

projects.name: OTTO
projects.description: Development of a voice-controlled e-commerce system with Google Assistant and AWS.
highlights: Dialog flows described with Dialogflow
Integration with Google Home and AWS
Collaboration with Google and OTTO

projects.name: Big Data Platform (NDA)
projects.description: Development of a research prototype for vehicle data analysis with React, NodeJS and AWS.
highlights: Created big data pipeline and dashboard
Map visualization with IoT data

projects.name: BankVerlag
projects.description: Collaboration on an online banking solution with a focus on security, UX and performance.
highlights: Feature implementation in the frontend
Collaboration with UX team
Optimization of security and performance

projects.name: RTL News
projects.description: Performance optimization and relaunch of the RTL News website as part of the #united campaign.
highlights: Optimization of tracking, marketing and data protection
Frontend and backend development with NextJS and NodeJS
Support for the relaunch in cross-functional teams

projects.name: CoachHub
projects.description: Development of a CRM dashboard and new coaching features with modern web technologies.
highlights: Low-code dashboard with NodeJS and PostgreSQL
Coaching feature with ReactJS and Docker
Coordination with stakeholders

projects.name: Wirtschaftsförderung Salzgitter GmbH
projects.description: Development of a digital travel guide and WordPress plugin for displaying tourist content with ReactJS and open data integration.
highlights: Implementation of a ReactJS application for tourist data
WordPress plugin with connection to Outdooractive open data interface
UX conception with Figma and Storybook
SEO optimization of content

projects.name: OpenDMS
projects.description: Open-source tools for processing, visualizing and analyzing tourist open data sources in Germany.
highlights: Implementation of API scrapers for Outdooractive, OpenData Germany, destination.one
Creation of data pipelines with Node.js and Rust
Development of tools for OpenStreetMap (OSM) to evaluate regional data
UX and frontend with React, Tailwind and shadcn-ui

projects.name: Expensify App Contribution
projects.description: Feature development and bug fixing as part of Expensify's External Contributors Program.
highlights: Collaboration on React Native codebase in web and app environments
Analysis and implementation of issues via GitHub
Testing with Jest and code reviews in the contributors team

work.name: Trassets GmbH
work.summary: Development of a SaaS platform for real estate valuation including login, role model, PowerBI embedding and automated cloud infrastructure.
highlights: Architecture and implementation of a SaaS platform with Next.js 15
Login, role management and permissions via AWS Cognito
BI dashboard embedding with PowerBI
Terraform-based infrastructure on AWS
Email template system with AWS SES
Workshops such as Magic Estimation & Lightning Decision Jam

work.name: Urlaubsguru
work.summary: Migration of the website to Next.js with a focus on SEO, performance, tracking and new features.
highlights: Migration from Wordpress/NuxtJS to Next.js 14
Implementation of new features: navigation, career page, attribution tracking
Integration of a consent management system with Sourcepoint
Use of web components and AWS Amplify
Extension of the CI/CD pipeline with CDK for Terraform

work.name: Netronaut GmbH
work.summary: Freelance fullstack developer and architect – implementation of data-driven web platforms for clients from tourism, media, automotive, finance and real estate industries.
highlights: Founding and management of Netronaut GmbH
Implementation of over 20 projects for clients such as RTL, Otto, Volkswagen, Salzgitter, Trassets, Lufthansa
Specialization in data-driven platforms and open data
Workshops on prototyping, UX, architecture and sprint planning

work.name: Spielraum UG
work.summary: Building and supporting an interdisciplinary development studio. In the role of technical consultant, architect and fullstack developer, I accompanied a junior team and structured technical decision-making processes.
highlights: Implemented a data-intensive automotive project
Use of modern web technologies
Collaborative methods such as design sprints and lightning decision jams

work.name: Prodyna SE
work.summary: Permanent software developer and IT consultant. Implementation of projects for clients from the automotive and industrial sectors.
highlights: Specialization in Java 2 Enterprise Edition including certification
Expansion and learning of project management and Scrum methods
Implementation of various projects in the Java environment (portal server, J2EE, Java APIs, web applications)

work.name: Self-employed
highlights: Software development for websites and web applications
Implementation of numerous projects for clients in tourism, art, administration, advertising, media and real estate.
Specialization in web technologies HTML, CSS, Javascript, PHP, Python, Java and MySQL
